title: Crunch Avocado American Salad
description: A savory and creamy solo-dinner dish featuring avocado as the star ingredient with a dairy-free-friendly sauce.
instructions: Prepare the avocado by peeling and removing the stone. Cut into slices about 1 cm thick.
Rub salt and pepper on both sides of chicken breasts and let sit for at least 20 minutes to allow flavors to penetrate.
Meanwhile, in a mixing bowl, combine lime juice, tomato sauce (tomato paste), dijon mustard, olive oil, unsweetened shredded coconut, and zest. Mix well to create the dressing.
After marinating chicken breasts, cut them into wedges about 1 cm thick.
To assemble: place slices of avocado on a serving plate. Top with sliced red onion. Arrange chicken pieces on top of avocado. Drizzle dressing over all and sprinkle with coconut. Serve immediately.
Broil the salad for an additional 2-3 minutes until crispy, watching carefully to avoid burning.
